banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Priya Anand Nair, a sole owner filing a New homestead exemption application for her Miami-Dade primary residence for the 2026 tax year. She has no co-applicant/spouse on title. She is a US citizen, established her homestead on the filing date, does not claim residency or a homestead anywhere else, and is not requesting any of the additional benefit checkboxes (senior, widowed, blind, disability, first responder, or veteran) beyond the base homestead exemption. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/fl/miami-dade/pa/homestead-exemption). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the Miami-Dade County Property Appraiser, the Florida Department of Revenue, or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, sign the physical application (or complete the Property Appraiser's own online e-file portal directly), enclose or upload the required proof-of-residency documentation, and file it with the Property Appraiser's office by March 1 before it has any effect. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
